note: Deployable combined frontier: rotated-symmetric (026, free popcount-speed) + tiling (016) + prefix (014/027). Rotation shifts the whole recall-vs-QPS Pareto OUTWARD vs non-rotated 018: higher recall and/or QPS at every tier. Best new points: 0.996 @ 844 (1024/C=1000), 0.999 @ 730 (1024/C=2000), 0.994 @ 815 (768/C=2000 - prefix now viable at high recall thanks to rotation, +8pts recall AND +7% QPS over 018's 768/C=2000). vs original 009 (0.994 @ 585) and 020 best (0.993 @ 851).
